news.t: JPMorgan Converts $950M to Active NY, CA Muni ETFs

overview.description: The Vanguard California Tax-Exempt Bond ETF (VTEC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market value-weighted index of tax-exempt investment grade debt issued by California governments and agencies. VTEC was launched on Jan 30, 2024 and is issued by Vanguard.

data.title: JPMorgan Converts $950M to Active NY, CA Muni ETFs
data.text: This week J.P. Morgan Asset Management launched two actively managed municipal bond ETFs focused on California and New York debt, offering investors a way to earn tax-free income inside a more flexibl...
